pages.translation: A shepherd walked in the mountains.
He found a small cave in the rock.
Little dwarfs lived in the cave.
They made gold for the king.

pages.hebrew: יוֹם אֶחָד הַמֶּלֶךְ גִּירֵשׁ אֶת הָרוֹעֶה.
pages.translation: One day, the king chased the shepherd away.
The shepherd returned to the cave.
The dwarfs gave him a lot of money.
